1.message: Maximum update depth exceeded. Octane limits the number of nested updates to prevent infinite loops.

2.message: Children.only expected to receive a single element child.

3.message: Objects are not valid as an Octane child (found: %s). If you meant to render a collection of children, use an array instead.

4.message: cloneElement: the first argument must be an element (from createElement / JSX).

5.message: Can only set one of `children` or `props.dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

7.message: `%s` is a void element tag and must neither have `children` nor use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

8.message: `<%s>` is a void element tag and must neither have children nor use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

9.message: Too many re-renders. Octane limits the number of renders to prevent an infinite loop.

10.message: lazy: expected the load() promise to resolve to a component function or a module with a component as its default export, got '%s'

11.message: A function wrapped in useEffectEvent can't be called during rendering.

12.message: %s(): argument is not a Context nor a thenable

13.message: Multiple errors were thrown during the render flush.

14.message: act(): scheduler did not stabilize after %s iterations — likely an infinite render loop

15.message: %s was called without a hook slot. The octane compiler injects per-call-site keys; ensure your project loads this runtime through the Vite plugin (octane/compiler/vite). To call hooks by hand, pass a stable symbol, e.g. useState(0, Symbol.for('my-stable-id')).

16.message: Hydrate: `when` must synchronously return a hydration strategy with a valid type.

17.message: Hydrate: the compiler-generated child loader did not resolve to a component.

18.message: %s(): a React context can only be read inside a React-hosted Octane island (see octane/react); this component is not rendered under one.

19.message: A renderer-owned DOM region is missing its universal owner bridge.

20.message: bindRendererRegionOwner() must run while a DOM component is rendering.

21.message: bindRendererRegionOwner() must be the first call in a renderer-owned DOM root component.

22.message: A renderer-owned DOM region requires a live DOM root.

24.message: Element type is invalid: expected a string (for a built-in element) or a function (for a component), but got: %s.

25.message: Octane: internal — a component descriptor reached the de-opt host reconciler (should have been routed through a Block via hostElementBody/componentSlot).

26.message: `<%s>` is a void element tag and must neither have `children` nor use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

27.message: A hosted foreign-context request escaped its renderer-region owner; the owning bridge is gone or declined it.

28.message: Target container is not a DOM element.

31.message: If you supply `defaultValue` on a <textarea>, do not pass children.

32.message: octane SSR: a use(thenable) did not settle within %sms.

33.message: octane SSR: exceeded %s suspense passes — a use(thenable) never resolved.

34.message: octane SSR: a root suspension no longer has resumable work.

35.message: octane SSR: %s root streaming passes completed without producing a shell.

36.message: octane SSR: a pending streamed boundary no longer has resumable work; its error escaped to an ancestor that was already flushed.

37.message: octane SSR: %s consecutive streaming passes completed no boundary — a use(thenable) never resolved.

39.message: octane SSR: destination.write() returned false but the destination cannot emit drain.

41.message: octane SSR: pipe() may only be called once.

46.message: Expected %s listener to be a function, instead got a value of `%s` type.

47.message: octane SSR: exceeded %s suspense passes — a use(thenable) never resolved. If promises are re-created on every render pass (e.g. created in an ancestor render and passed down through props), create them at their use() site or hoist them out of render.

48.message: octane SSR: %s consecutive streaming passes completed no boundary — a use(thenable) never resolved. If promises are re-created on every render pass (e.g. created in an ancestor render and passed down through props), create them at their use() site or hoist them out of render.
